prevalence.source: IHME GBD / European headache epidemiology syntheses

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: ICHD-3 criteria; red flag assessment to exclude secondary headache

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with guideline-based management and access to non-pharmacologic therapies

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care pathways often manage TTH with neurology referral for refractory cases
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Education, lifestyle, simple analgesics; preventive therapy for chronic cases; physiotherapy and behavioral interventions available in many systems
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Medication overuse and access variability across member states
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong primary care and access to multidisciplinary headache management in many countries
